title: Purple EXP
description: Changes everything exp from the old stale green to a fresh new purple.
body:
Makes All Experience in the game purple.

# All Texture Changes
- Purple Experience Orbs
- Purple Experience Level
- Purple Experience Bar
- Purple Experience Level In Enchantment Table GUI
- Purple Experience Bar In Villager Trading GUI
- Purple Splash Bottle o' Enchanting
- Old Enchantment Glint

This pack works with most mods and resource packs.
